nodes.name: Daily 6 AM CST
nodes.notes: Cron: 0 6 * * * — daily at 06:00 server time (OrbStack). Adjust if you change timezone preference.

nodes.name: Scan Expiring Certs (RPC)
nodes.notes: Calls public.scan_expiring_certs() function. Returns counts: alerts_created, alerts_escalated, alerts_cured, certs_scanned, level_1_count, level_2_count, level_3_count. Pure idempotent function — safe to call multiple times per day.

nodes.name: Has Activity?
nodes.notes: Skip Slack post on quiet days (no creates/escalates/cures). Reduces channel noise.

parameters.text:
{{ $json.severity_icon }} *Daily Cert Expiration Scan*

| Metric | Count |
|---|---|
| Certs scanned | {{ $json.certs_scanned }} |
| Alerts created | {{ $json.alerts_created }} |
| Alerts escalated | {{ $json.alerts_escalated }} |
| Alerts cured (cert renewed) | {{ $json.alerts_cured }} |

*By severity*
• Level 3 (expired): {{ $json.level_3_count }}
• Level 2 (≤7 days): {{ $json.level_2_count }}
• Level 1 (≤30 days): {{ $json.level_1_count }}

_Run: {{ $json.run_timestamp }} · Execution: `{{ $json.n8n_execution_id }}`_

nodes.name: Slack: Daily Summary
nodes.notes: Posts to #bfc-compliance-alerts (C0B0ZT3P79R). Same channel as Workflow 1 alerts and error handler. Severity icon adapts to highest level detected.
